task: deals-api-integration Phase 3 (DEAL-003 / #24) — code touchpoints under change for the server-authoritative deal apply

snippets.description: FK precedent for the new deal_id column: branch_id uses .references(() => branches.id) with no onDelete (NO ACTION). deal_id follows this pattern but WITHOUT .notNull() (nullable).
createOrderSchema — gains dealId: z.string().uuid().optional(). No price/discount field is ever accepted (server-authority boundary).
snippets.content: const createOrderSchema = z.object({ branchId, paymentMethod, items }); // + dealId: z.string().uuid().optional()

snippets.description: Subtotal-accumulation loop. The in-tx deal block is inserted AFTER this loop (subtotal known) and BEFORE the order insert (line 165).
snippets.content: let subtotalCents = 0; for (const line of body.items) { ... subtotalCents += lineTotalCents; }

snippets.description: Order insert — the hard-set discount_total: '0.00' / total: centsToNumeric(subtotalCents) become computed values; deal_id added.
Server-side discount helper. discountValue is the RAW deals.discount_value decimal string. Both clamps mandatory.
snippets.content: computeDealDiscountCents(dealType, discountValue, subtotalCents): fixed -> max(0, min(round(Number(v)*100), subtotal)); percentage -> max(0, min(round(subtotal*Number(v)/100), subtotal))

snippets.description: Migration DDL — additive nullable column + FK to deals(id). Generated by db:generate, not hand-written.
snippets.content: ALTER TABLE "orders" ADD COLUMN "deal_id" uuid; ALTER TABLE "orders" ADD CONSTRAINT ... FOREIGN KEY ("deal_id") REFERENCES "deals"("id");

snippets.description: ApiOrder gains dealId: string | null; serializeOrder maps order.deal_id.
snippets.content: interface ApiOrder { ... } ; serializeOrder(order, items): { ..., dealId: order.deal_id }

snippets.description: applyDealById becomes async (await getDeal), rejects the 4 complex deal types before applying (client backstop for C1). resolveAndApplyDeal deleted (cart code-input removed).
snippets.content: export function applyDealById(dealId, cart, pickupBranchId, usage) { const deal = MOCK_DEALS.find(...) }

snippets.description: checkout passes dealId from cart.appliedDiscount into placeOrder; Total display changed from subtotalCents to totalCents (money-display bug fix).
useReorderConflicts() import + conflict-notice render path PRESERVED untouched. Code-input UI (couponCode state, handleApplyCoupon, Input branch) deleted.
